query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `driver_queue` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `driver_id` int NOT NULL,
  `position` int NOT NULL,
  `went_online_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `last_completed_at` timestamp NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `driver_queue_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `dq_driver_id_idx` (`driver_id`),
  INDEX `dq_position_idx` (`position`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `driver_queue` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `driver_id` int NOT NULL,
  `position` int NOT NULL,
  `went_online_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `last_completed_at` timestamp NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `driver_queue_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `dq_driver_id_idx` (`driver_id`),
  INDEX `dq_position_idx` (`position`)
);
